name: Hill's Science Diet Adult 7+ Chicken & Brown Rice Recipe Dry Dog Food
description: Your senior dog may be a puppy at heart, but his nutritional needs are unique! Hill’s Science Diet Senior 7+ Chicken Flavored No Corn, Wheat or Soy Dry Dog food is specifically formulated for your aging pup—made with natural ingredients and added vitamins, minerals and amino acids to help support his heart, kidneys and coat. The high-quality protein formula helps encourage lean muscles on your older best bud. Included antioxidants and vitamins C and E also help support a healthy immune system. Made in the USA with no corn, wheat or soy, this senior dry dog food is both a delicious and nutritious meal that will help support your senior pal’s health and energy!
